items.title: Huge VAR call prolongs Ronaldo's last dance but ends Modric's
items.summary: Veteran forward Cristiano Ronaldo gets another day on the World Cup stage after Croatia are denied a late equaliser by a huge VAR call.

items.title: Portugal through to last 16 after dramatic victory over Croatia
items.summary: Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos after a chaotic second-half in Toronto to set up a last 16 tie with Iberian rivals Spain.

items.title: Tuchel wants young England fans to stay up for 1am World Cup clash - but should they?
items.summary: England's must-win match against Mexico kicks off at 01:00 BST on Monday - disco naps and spoiler-free recaps may be needed.

items.title: Cristiano Ronaldo reveals what he told Luka Modric during emotional moment together in World Cup clash
items.summary: CRISTIANO RONALDO had an emotional reunion with legendary Real Madrid team-mate Luka Modric after Portugal's clash with Croatia at the World Cup. items.title: Cristiano Ronaldo responds to his sister’s claims he is retiring from international football after World Cup
items.summary: CRISTIANO RONALDO shut down claims from his own SISTER that he has plans to retire at the end of the World Cup. Katia Aveiro, his elder sibling, was reported in Portugal as saying that CR7 would hang up his boots from the international game when his tournament ends. That emerged just minutes before

items.title: Jurgen Klopp ‘ready to return to management and accept top job’ two years after leaving Liverpool
items.summary: JURGEN KLOPP is set to replace Julian Nagelsmann as the new Germany boss, according to reports. The former Liverpool manager will accept the call from the DFB, Ben Jacobs says, with Nagelsmann getting the sack. Germany were dumped out of the World Cup on penalties by Paraguay earlier this week.
